name: Charlo's Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the wet ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, sugar, salt, and cinnamon) to the wet mixture and stir until just incorporated.
4. Stir in the grated zucchini and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the batter into two greased loaf pans, filling them evenly.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaves comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for about 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
This recipe doubles easily. You could have made four loaves, but I only had three loaf pans. I made three loaves, and some zucchini muffins.
